assertions.name: report_exists
assertions.description: AUDIT-REPORT.md file was created in the outputs directory

assertions.name: covers_all_9_areas
assertions.description: Report mentions all 9 audit areas: CLAUDE.md, Rules, Skills, Sub-agents, Hooks, Permissions, Settings, MCP, Features
assertions.check: All 9 area names appear in the report body

assertions.name: has_current_state_table
assertions.description: Report contains a Current State summary table with status per area
assertions.check: A markdown table with area names and status indicators exists

assertions.name: findings_have_sources
assertions.description: Every finding block includes a Source line with a real URL from Anthropic docs
assertions.check: Each finding has a **Source**: line containing a docs.anthropic.com URL

assertions.name: has_provenance_markers
assertions.description: Source citations include (via MCP) or (via Playwright CLI) provenance tags
assertions.check: Source lines contain '(via MCP)' or '(via Playwright CLI)'

assertions.name: uses_finding_tags
assertions.check: Finding headers contain good, improve, or fix tags

assertions.name: has_priority_actions
assertions.description: Report includes a Priority Actions section with ranked recommendations
assertions.check: A Priority Actions section with a table or numbered list exists

assertions.name: has_next_steps
assertions.description: Report ends with Next Steps directing user to Plan mode
assertions.check: Next Steps section mentions Plan mode or /plan
